_comment: Public SG/ASEAN disclosure regimes. effective_year gates applicability: a reg not yet in force in a reporting year is NA/readiness-gap, NEVER a violation (T9). 'scope' restricts which companies it binds.

regulations.name: SGX Sustainability Reporting (Comply-or-Explain)
regulations.requirement: Annual sustainability report on material ESG factors with a board statement.

regulations.name: SGX Mandatory Climate Reporting (TCFD-aligned)
regulations.requirement: TCFD-aligned climate disclosures including Scope 1 and Scope 2 emissions.

regulations.name: IFRS S2 / ISSB Climate-related Disclosures
regulations.requirement: ISSB-aligned climate disclosures incl. Scope 3 roadmap and scenario analysis.

regulations.name: MAS Guidelines on Environmental Risk Management
regulations.requirement: Board-level environmental risk governance and disclosure for financial institutions.

regulations.name: ASEAN Taxonomy for Sustainable Finance
regulations.requirement: Classification/alignment of activities against the ASEAN Taxonomy.
